prompt: Make a landing page for a productivity SaaS called FocusFlow. It blocks distracting websites and shows you a live focus timer. For remote workers who can't stop doom-scrolling during work hours.

assertions.description: Hero contains an animated visual specific to focus/blocking (tabs being X'd out, timer animation)
Page uses dark background (#0d0d0d or similar)
Uses cyan or blue accent color appropriate for tech/SaaS
Hero headline is 10 words or fewer
Stats section with at least 3 social proof numbers
Feature grid with at least 4 cards
Final CTA with email input and button
A countdown/focus timer is present and animated or functional
